metadata.description: A Claude Code marketplace providing Git hosting integration plugins for GitLab and Bitbucket

plugins.name: gitlab
plugins.description: Full GitLab integration for Claude Code sessions using the glab CLI. Provides skills for merge requests, issues, CI/CD pipelines, repository management, and automatic glab installation.

plugins.name: bitbucket
plugins.description: Full Bitbucket Cloud integration for Claude Code sessions using the bbt CLI. Provides skills for pull requests, issues, pipelines, repository management, and automatic bbt installation.
